hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("\\.(md|el|sh)$")' > /dev/null && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Source file changed — run /doc-check to verify documentation consistency."}}' || true

jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | test("\\.el$")' > /dev/null && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Lisp file changed — run ./check.sh to verify all checks and tests pass."}}' || true
